description:
OrgSync is a native, local-first home for your .org files. Capture notes, organize projects, and work from a focused agenda—without giving up ownership of your data.

WRITE IN ORG MODE
Browse, read, and edit plain-text .org files with support for headings, TODO states, priorities, tags, timestamps, checkboxes, tables, links, source blocks, drawers, and inline formatting.

TURN NOTES INTO A PLAN
Use the Agenda to see what is due today, what is coming up, and every open task. Add new items directly to your inbox with a state, schedule, deadline, and tags.

MAKE IT YOURS
Customize TODO states and colors, choose an appearance, and keep favorite notes close.

FREE FOREVER
Writing, organizing, agenda, search, favorites, and Siri and Shortcuts are free—no account, ever. Prefer to sync across devices for free? Store your notes in the app's iCloud Drive folder and Apple keeps them in sync.

ORGSYNC PRO
A subscription unlocks four power features: GitHub repository sync (clone, pull, review changes, resolve conflicts, commit, and push with your own fine-grained Personal Access Token), Home Screen widgets for favorites and upcoming work, two-way Reminders plus read-only Calendar sync, and local notifications for scheduled and deadline TODOs at the lead times you choose. Subscriptions stay anonymous: the only identifier is a random RevenueCat ID—never your name, email, or notes.

PRIVATE BY DEFAULT
OrgSync collects, tracks, analyzes, and sells no data. There is no account system, analytics SDK, advertising, telemetry, or OrgSync-operated server. Your notes stay on your device unless you explicitly enable iCloud Drive storage, GitHub sync, or Reminders/Calendar integration.

Privacy Policy: https://github.com/memohnsen/OrgSync/blob/main/PRIVACY.org
Terms of Use: https://github.com/memohnsen/OrgSync/blob/main/TERMS.org
promotionalText: Your .org files, always local, always yours.
